label: Lupine Controls
description: Control the Lupine SL Grano F from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with ride-aware connection handling and a Lupine-specific control surface.
releaseNotes:
* Fresh pairing now keeps one stable BLE target per attempt instead of hopping across candidates
* Added capture-backed protocol tests for the proven Lupine init and OFF notify frames
* Published Beta 1.7 install metadata
* Further BLE command and status decoding still depends on protocol details from Lupine because the remote session is encrypted after pairing
